author: anon-581fd578
content:
Root cause found: TWO issues.

1. Text glyph positions from cosmic-text shaping are relative to origin (0,0). emit_node in commands.rs passes them through without adding the node's layout position (nl.x, nl.y). FillRect correctly uses nl.x/nl.y but Text does not.

2. The glyph positions also need to account for padding — text content should start at nl.x + nl.padding.left, nl.y + nl.padding.top.

Fix: In emit_node, when emitting Text commands, offset each glyph position by the node's layout position + padding. This is how Iced, Zed/GPUI, and other frameworks handle it — all draw commands use absolute screen coordinates.
